manga.title: Cannon Fodder's Record of Counterattacks
manga.description: Ning Shu had dropped dead. But fortunately, she became a task-taker in charge of counterattacking for pitiful cannon fodder. Thus, Ning Shu played various kinds of life roles in various worlds, encountering many people who caused trouble for no reason. Transmigrated protagonist, reborn protagonist. Ning Shu had no choice but to painfully collect moral integrity in various worlds.
